summary: Frontend-only testing of FinPremium (Dark Mode Premium). Fixed a compile-blocking syntax error in Debts.jsx (leftover garbage lines 297-307 after the component's closing brace) that was preventing the entire app from loading. After fix, verified all 6 routes, dashboard widgets (KPIs, pie/line charts, FIRE card, 50/30/20, alertas), budget CRUD + income recalculation, debt snowball/avalanche + 'Livre em 22 meses' with extra=500, FIRE recalculation (5000 -> R$ 1.500.000), goal add, bonus page 6 expandable cards, scope tabs and both MD/PDF downloads, and localStorage persistence across navigation.

ui_bugs.issue: File had 11 lines of leftover garbage after final closing brace causing 'Missing semicolon (297:36)' compile error and the WHOLE APP failed to render. Fixed by truncating file to line 296.

issues: Goal 'Prazo' field uses native browser date input instead of a shadcn calendar component (minor - system prompt flags this pattern).

action_items: The syntax-error fix in Debts.jsx should be reviewed by main agent to ensure no intended UI was accidentally removed (only stray/duplicate JSX fragments after the closing brace were deleted; the visible add-debt row above still works).
Consider replacing native date picker in Goals with shadcn calendar component for design consistency.
critical_code_review_comments: Debts.jsx contained 11 lines of dead/duplicated JSX after `export default function Debts` return — indicates a bad merge/paste. Now removed.
FinanceContext persists entire state to localStorage 'finpremium_v1' — OK for single-user MVP, but no versioning/migration if defaultState shape changes in the future.
PDF generation uses jsPDF client-side and works, but only helvetica is embedded (Fraunces/Manrope typography is lost in the exported PDF).
seed_data_creation: None - localStorage defaults used. Test items 'TEST_Add', 'TEST_Debt', 'TEST_Goal' were created via UI during testing and persist in browser localStorage.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is single-user, no backend. All state in localStorage 'finpremium_v1'. Test data prefixed TEST_ was added during this run and lives in browser storage. To reset, clear localStorage. Debts.jsx was truncated to remove trailing garbage; if new debt add UI regressions appear, check that the visible <tr> at bottom of debts-table still contains debt-new-* inputs and debt-add button.
rca of the issue: Root cause of compile failure: Debts.jsx had duplicate fragments (lines 297-307) after `}` closing the component, likely from a previous incomplete edit. Babel parser expected EOF after the export default function's closing brace, encountered `color: "var(--gold-bright)", ...` and reported 'Missing semicolon'. Fix: truncated file to line 296. Verified webpack now compiles successfully and app renders.
